# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build & Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
  PR_BRANCH: ${{ github.head_ref }}
  BASE_BRANCH: ${{ github.base_ref }}
  REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build (PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }})
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event.pull_request.draft == false }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Prepare PR metadata
        id: pr
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          title="${PR_TITLE}"
          body="${PR_BODY:-}"

          # Single-line, safe for commit messages / notifications
          title_one_line="$(printf '%s' "$title" | tr '\r\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g' | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]+|[[:space:]]+$//g')"
          body_one_line="$(printf '%s' "$body" | tr '\r\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g' | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]+|[[:space:]]+$//g')"

          # Keep notification payloads reasonable
          title_short="$(printf '%s' "$title_one_line" | head -c 180)"
          body_short="$(printf '%s' "$body_one_line" | head -c 800)"

          commit_subject="PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${title_short}"
          build_label="pr-${PR_NUMBER}"

          {
            echo "title_one_line=$title_one_line"
            echo "body_one_line=$body_one_line"
            echo "title_short=$title_short"
            echo "body_short=$body_short"
            echo "commit_subject=$commit_subject"
            echo "build_label=$build_label"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Set up Node (example)
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Install (example)
        run: npm ci

      - name: Test (example)
        run: npm test

      - name: Build (example)
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Create tracking commit message (no push)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Commit message to use in downstream deploy/release automation:"
          echo "${{ steps.pr.outputs.commit_subject }}"
          echo
          echo "PR title:"
          echo "${{ steps.pr.outputs.title_one_line }}"
          echo
          echo "PR description:"
          echo "${{ steps.pr.outputs.body_one_line }}"

      - name: Notify (Slack webhook)
        if: ${{ always() && secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != '' }}
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          JOB_STATUS: ${{ job.status }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          color="#36a64f"
          if [ "$JOB_STATUS" != "success" ]; then color="#e01e5a"; fi

          payload="$(jq -n \
            --arg repo "$REPO" \
            --arg pr_number "$PR_NUMBER" \
            --arg pr_url "$PR_URL" \
            --arg pr_branch "$PR_BRANCH" \
            --arg base_branch "$BASE_BRANCH" \
            --arg sha "$SHA" \
            --arg status "$JOB_STATUS" \
            --arg commit_subject "${{ steps.pr.outputs.commit_subject }}" \
            --arg pr_title "${{ steps.pr.outputs.title_short }}" \
            --arg pr_body "${{ steps.pr.outputs.body_short }}" \
            --arg color "$color" \
            '{
              attachments: [
                {
                  color: $color,
                  title: ("PR Build " + ($status|ascii_upcase) + " — " + $repo),
                  title_link: $pr_url,
                  fields: [
                    { title: "PR", value: ("#" + $pr_number), short: true },
                    { title: "Branch", value: ($pr_branch + " → " + $base_branch), short: true },
                    { title: "SHA", value: $sha, short: true },
                    { title: "Tracking Commit Message", value: $commit_subject, short: false },
                    { title: "PR Title", value: $pr_title, short: false },
                    { title: "PR Description", value: (if ($pr_body|length) > 0 then $pr_body else "(empty)" end), short: false }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            }')"

          curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$payload" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"

      - name: Notify (generic webhook)
        if: ${{ always() && secrets.NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL != '' }}
        env:
          NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          JOB_STATUS: ${{ job.status }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          payload="$(jq -n \
            --arg repo "$REPO" \
            --arg pr_number "$PR_NUMBER" \
            --arg pr_url "$PR_URL" \
            --arg pr_branch "$PR_BRANCH" \
            --arg base_branch "$BASE_BRANCH" \
            --arg sha "$SHA" \
            --arg status "$JOB_STATUS" \
            --arg commit_subject "${{ steps.pr.outputs.commit_subject }}" \
            --arg pr_title "${{ steps.pr.outputs.title_one_line }}" \
            --arg pr_body "${{ steps.pr.outputs.body_one_line }}" \
            '{
              event: "pull_request_build",
              repository: $repo,
              pull_request: {
                number: $pr_number,
                url: $pr_url,
                title: $pr_title,
                description: $pr_body,
                head: $pr_branch,
                base: $base_branch
              },
              tracking: {
                commit_subject: $commit_subject
              },
              sha: $sha,
              status: $status
            }')"

          curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$payload" "$NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL"
